$comment: Arty-reflector persona — Autoskill continual-learning agent dispatched via mesh_submit_mission(agent_type='a8-claw', context.persona='arty-reflector'). The cloud-main.ts runner reads context.persona and looks up this template directory to materialize the agent group's CLAUDE.md + config before spawning the bun agent-runner.
description: Reads mission_events trajectory, identifies patterns, writes tiered memory (episode / semantic_item / skill).
$tools_denied_rationale: Reflector is observe-and-write only — no peer dispatch (would recurse the reflector), no file access (reads mission_events, not files), no compute tools. This is enforced by the Platform MCP server when context.persona='arty-reflector' is set.

scheduled_default.$comment: Default 3am UTC nightly reflection. Tenants override via the mesh_schedule_mission registration. End-of-task triggers don't go through the cron path.
